texto: The problem with call-in shows is quite simple, if you only dare to admit it: Democracy is best when not everyone can be heard all the time. If we are constantly reminded of all the stupid things that people say and think, it becomes rather difficult to remember the good and noble arguments for everyone to be able to participate and decide.
explicacao: Citação de Johan Hakelius sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The problem with call-in shows is quite simple, if you only dare to admit it: Democracy is best w…” articula reflexao, democracy, elitism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como elitism e populism.
